titleStmt.title: SII 6.1110: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1110. (A.R. No. 347-C of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīśākābdēbdhinaṁdadyumaṇiparimitē śuklapakṣē nabhasyē rākāyāṁ sōma
vārē sakaḷaguṇagaṇālaṁkṛtō jhāḍupālaḥ . prādādācaṁdratāraṁ vimalataraya
śāḥ puṇyasaṁtāna vṛ(ṁ)dyai śrīmatsiṁhādracūḍāmaṇinaraharayē caṁdraśubhrā
tapatraṁ . śākābdē 1294 va[¨r*]ṣa bhādrapada pau[¨r*]nnamī sōmavārē dhanaṁjayagōtrajāta gōpā
ḷanāyakaṁkara putra jhāḍupālapaḍirāya Apaṇaṁki Āyurārōgyaisva¨ryyasaṁtā
nābhivṛdhya¨rttha śrīnarasiṁganātadēvaṁkara Ubhayadhūpē dūyi beḍāsamaya mā
sōtsava va[¨r]ṣōtsavasamayē dhavaḷacatradaricā A¨rttē śrīna¨rsiṁgunātadēvaṁkara śrī
bhaṁḍārē padmanidhigaṁḍamāḍa dasa dēĪ nityapaḍi dūyi kuṁcā bhātani nibhaṁ
dha samasyāye pīṭhabarisapaḍibattana vṛttikari saṁpādi cellumaṁcunāyaka
rapō tiruvaḍināyakaki Ācaṁdrā[¨rkka]kari dhilla . dhavaḷacatrapatti barise kiṇivu Ata
ṁḍarē gaṁḍamāḍēka dillē . bhaḷakēnakha dille Aḍābhātabaṁdhyā dharice . Ī dha¨rmmuvu
śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa . śatruṇāpi kṛtō dha¨rmmaḥ pālanīyō mānīṣibhiḥ . śatrurēva hi śatru
syāddha¨rmmaśśatru¨rnna kasyacit śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
